summary: 25 remaining Drizzle .get() calls across 7 files need migration to .limit(1) for Postgres compatibility
details: Convention scout found 25 remaining .get() calls in: project/project.ts (13), session/projectors.ts (3), account/repo.ts (3), session/prompt.ts (2), session/message-v2.ts (2), permission/index.ts (1), v2/session.ts (1). The 3 in session/projectors.ts are highest risk — direct/unwrapped calls in sync projector callbacks that would silently break with async Postgres queries. Full migration requires addressing the sync Database.use()/transaction() wrappers, not just the .get() -> .limit(1) mechanical change.
